return_policy.overview: ShopEase offers a customer-friendly return policy to ensure satisfaction with every purchase. Returns are accepted within specified timeframes based on product category.

condition_requirements: Items must be unused and in original condition
Original packaging and tags must be intact
Proof of purchase required (order confirmation or receipt)
Items must be free from damage, stains, or alterations
non_returnable_items: Final sale items (marked as such at purchase)
Opened health and personal care items

electronics.conditions: Must include all accessories, manuals, and original packaging. Devices must not be activated or registered. Restocking fee of 15% applies to opened items.

clothing_accessories.conditions: Tags must be attached. Items must be unworn and unwashed. No visible signs of wear or deodorant marks.

furniture.conditions: Must be unassembled or in original packaging. Pickup can be arranged for large items. Return shipping fees vary by size.

appliances.conditions: Must be unused with original packaging. Installation voids return eligibility. Haul-away service available for large appliances.

jewelry_watches.conditions: Must include original certificates, boxes, and documentation. Professional appraisal may be required for high-value items.

customer_paid_shipping.conditions: Applies to returns for reasons other than defects or errors. Deducted from refund amount.

refund_process.timeline: 5-7 business days after receiving returned item
refund_process.partial_refunds: Applied if item shows signs of use or missing components
refund_process.store_credit_option: Instant store credit available (no shipping fee deducted)

shipping_policy.overview: ShopEase provides reliable shipping options to ensure timely delivery of your orders. Shipping costs and delivery times vary based on destination and selected method.

international.customs: Customer responsible for duties and taxes

processing_times.holiday_seasons: Extended processing up to 3-4 business days

order_tracking.tracking_issues: Contact support if no updates after 3 days

privacy_policy.overview: ShopEase is committed to protecting customer privacy and handling personal information responsibly in compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable regulations.

data_sharing.never_shared: Personal information is never sold to third parties

user_rights.access: Request copy of your personal data
user_rights.deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
user_rights.portability: Receive your data in portable format

measures: PCI DSS compliance for payment processing
Secure data storage with encryption at rest

price_match_policy.overview: ShopEase offers a price match guarantee to ensure you get the best value for your purchases.

eligibility.competitors: Authorized retailers with physical or online presence
conditions: Competitor must have item in stock
Excludes marketplace sellers and auction sites
One price match per item per customer

exclusions: Competitor coupons or gift card promotions

process.submission: Email proof of lower price to pricematch@shopease.com
process.adjustment: Refund difference to original payment method or store credit

gift_card_policy.overview: ShopEase gift cards are a perfect gifting option, redeemable for any products on our platform.

redemption.balance_check: Check balance online or during checkout
redemption.partial_use: Remaining balance saved for future purchases
redemption.combination: Can be combined with other gift cards (up to 5 per order)

terms.non_refundable: Gift cards cannot be refunded or exchanged for cash
terms.lost_cards: Replacement available with proof of purchase and card number
terms.fraud_protection: Immediately report lost or stolen cards
